title: notholaena jaliscana
intro: Notholaena jaliscana, also known as the Jaliscan rock fern or Jaliscan rock fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. It is native to Mexico and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Notholaena jaliscana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with a solvent to create a concentrated extract.
